name: PROSPECT CAPITAL CORP
summary: PART I In this Annual Report, the terms Prospect, the Company, we, us and our mean Prospect Capital Corporation and all entities included in our consolidated financial statements, unless the context specifically requires otherwise. General Prospect is a financial services company that primarily lends to and invests in middle market privately-held companies. We are a closed-end investment company incorporated in Maryland.
